blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,824 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 23.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
